rationale: cs362 belongs to the Infinitive subtree (Infinitive > Substantival), not Participle. A pattern named "Substantival Participle Clause" pointed its only evidence node to the wrong root/axis entirely -- a pre-existing Phase 3.7 mislabel exposed by the regression test. Corrected to reference the new Participle-root node proposed in patch_structure.tsv, so the pattern's name and its evidence are now internally consistent.
